description_long: This chair features a rounded, padded seat and a gently curved backrest, both upholstered in a warm brown leather or leather-like material. The seat and backrest are seamlessly integrated, creating a smooth, modern silhouette. Four slender, slightly tapered legs, likely made of dark metal or wood, provide sturdy support and a contemporary aesthetic. The chair lacks armrests, emphasizing a minimalist and versatile design suitable for various urban settings. The upholstery appears soft and comfortable, with a matte finish and subtle texture. Its compact form makes it ideal for use in cafes, waiting areas, or modern dining spaces.
description: A modern, brown leather-upholstered chair with a rounded backrest and four slender dark legs, lacking armrests. The design is minimalist and comfortable, suitable for urban indoor environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded seat and curved backrest, highlighting the seamless upholstery and absence of armrests.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the gentle backward slope of the backrest and the thickness of the padded seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, continuous curve of the backrest and the uniform brown upholstery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the profile of the seat and backrest, emphasizing the chair's ergonomic curve.
